title: 0756's Bundle
description: Tweaks and optimisations for playing with friends.
body:
0756's Bundle is a comprehensive mod pack designed to enhance Minecraft through performance optimizations, quality-of-life improvements, and streamlined control features. With a focus on boosting game performance, improving visuals, and offering intuitive management tools, this bundle offers a more polished and efficient gameplay experience. Whether it's smoother frame rates, better customization, or easier access to shaders and texture packs, this collection provides everything needed for a seamless and enjoyable Minecraft experience.

### Performance & Optimization:
- **Sodium & Lithium**: These performance-boosting mods optimize rendering and memory usage, resulting in smoother frame rates and reduced stuttering.
- **Iris**: This shader mod integrates seamlessly with Sodium, allowing you to enjoy high-quality shaders without sacrificing performance.
- **FerriteCore**: Optimizes memory usage, reducing lag caused by chunk loading and other world processes, ensuring a smoother experience.
- **ImmediatelyFast**: Speeds up delayed operations by moving them to the GPU, improving responsiveness and reducing lag.
- **Clumps**: Groups nearby XP orbs together, reducing the performance hit from lots of orbs.

### Tweaks:
- **Visuality**: Enhances game visuals with customizable rendering and particle options, making the game more immersive and visually appealing.
- **3D Skin Layers**: Adds more depth and detail to player skins, giving them a more dynamic and personalized appearance.

### QoL:
- **Resourcify**: Simplifies the process of browsing, downloading, and installing shaders and texture packs, allowing you to easily enhance the visual quality of your game.
- **Controllify**: Adds controller support, making input more versatile as well as greatly inproving the Steam Deck experience.
- **WTHIT**: Displays useful information about blocks and items when you hover over them, intuitively providing information about vanilla and modded blocks.
- **Better F3**: A more user-friendly and informative version of the vanilla F3 debug screen, providing you with detailed game data at a glance.
- **Chat Heads**: Adds heads to players' names in chat to make it easier to remember people.
- **Essential**: A must-have for multiplayer, Essential adds a friends list, chat, and other features to improve your online play.
- **Mod Menu**: Easily manage installed mods, to make configuring them simple.
- **AppleSkin**: Quickly see foods' benefits to improve hunger managemnt.
- **Zoomify**: Adds cinematic zoom modes to make exploring your world easier.

[Craiyon](https://www.craiyon.com/) was used to generate the icon background.
